name: Sichuan Languang Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Languang Development Co., Ltd. engages in real estate and pharmaceutical manufacturing businesses in China. The company develops and operates residential properties; and commercial properties, including cultural tourism, hotel, and office buildings, as well as offers landscape and decoration services. It also researches and develops stem cell bio-ink technology for 3D bio-printing; and researches and develops, and marketing of pharmaceuticals and medical devices. The company was formerly known as Sichuan Di Kang Technology Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sichuan Languang Development Co., Ltd. in April 2015. Sichuan Languang Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China. Sichuan Languang Development Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Blue Light Investment Holdings Group Co., Ltd.
